titleStmt.title: SII 28.65: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 65. (A.R. No. 64 of 1913.) TIRUCHCHEṄGĀṬṬĀṄGUḌI, NANNILAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Uttarāpatīśvara temple, Gaṇapatīśvara shrine, west base of the maṇḍapa in front of

That the record is dated in the year 45, indicates that the king mentioned was Kulōttuṅga I. It was Kulōttuṅga III, the dating of this record will mean that his reign extended upto this date instead of upto only his year 40.

It records the making of two plots of land, one of 1/2 vēli and the other of 1/2 vēli and mā thus totalling 1 vēli 1 mā as iṟai-ili (tax-free) by the ūravar of Tiruchcheṅgāṭṭāṅguḍi in Marukal-nāḍu in Gēyamāṇikkavaḷanāḍu in favour of the Gods Gaṇavatīśvaram-uḍaiyār and Uttarāpatināyakar to provide for the flower tiru-chcheṅ-kaḻunīr required for the midnight service, by raising the same (in a garden) by utilising the two plots of land referred to above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅ
ka coḻatevaṟku (1) yāṇṭu 4 10 5 keyamā
ṇikka vaḷanāṭṭu marukal nāṭṭu tirucceṅkā
ṭṭaṅkuṭi Ūravarom Uṭaiyār kaṇava
tiśvaramuṭaiyārum Uṭaiyār Uttarāpati nā
yakaṟkum koyilc cimākeśvarakkaṇkāṇi
ceyvārkaḷum śrīkāriyañ ceyvāṉukku
m tevarkaṉmi koyiṟ kaṇakkaṉukkum nāṅ
kaḷ Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu Uṭai
yār kaṇapatiśvaramuṭaiyārum Uṭaiyār
Uttarāpati nāyakarum tiruattacāmak kālattut
tirucceṅkaḻunīr tiruppaḷḷittāmam cāttiya
ruḷavum mālaiyum Ākkit tiruppaḷḷitāmat ti
runantavaṉami Ākkavum Iṟaiyili ceyta Iv
vūrkku nirpāyk kuḷamuṅ karaiyumākak kal
liṉa nilattut tirucceṅkaḻunir Iṭa viṭ
ṭa nirnilai rūpāy (1/2) Inrūpāyum Araiyum mānilai
yum tirupaḷḷittāmamum Ākka Iṭṭa karai
rūpāy (1/2)m Innilam Araiye Orumāvum Āka rūpāy
1 mā Innilam Oṉṟe Orumāvum Iṟaiyili
yākac cantirātittavaṟ cācukatīmāka kal
lilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷa
k kaṭavarkaḷākavum Iṟaiyili ce
ytu kuṭuttom Ivūr Ūravarom
Ippaṭikku Ivai pa Ūrk
kaṇakku nāvalūruṭaiyaṉ Araṅkaṉ Oṟ
ṟi koṇṭare Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
karuppūruṭaiyāṉ centāmaraikkaṇṇa
[śrī]irācentiracoḻavicaiyāraṉ EḻututRead eḻuttuI
ppaṭikku Ivai Empalamuṭaiyāṉ tāmo
tiraṉ matavaṭikaṇaṉ coḻaṉaṇukkaṉ(ṉa) Eḻu
Ippaṭikku Ivai Empalamuṭaiyāṉ tām
otaraṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Empala
muṭaiyāṉ kayilāyaṉ kecavaṉ Eḻuttu I
ppaṭikku Ivai Āyiṟkāvuṭaiyāṉ Ātitta
tevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pirampavaṅkuṭ
aiyāṉ nitta kalliyāṇaṉ cuntaraṉ Eḻut
tu Ippaṭikku Ivai cāttamaṅkalamuṭaiy
āṉ Ātittaṉ veṇkāṭaṉāṉa jayaṅko
ṇṭacoḻat tiraimurnāṭṭu viḻup
paraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkuḷi�
ṭaiyāṉ Accaṉ niṉaiyaṉ Eḻuttu
ppaṭikku Ivai kāṉūruṭaiyāṉ
ccāṉ tevaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai koṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ
Ippaṭikku I ruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai Ātic ttu [§]
Digital edition of SII 28.65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
